name: Poached Chicken Breasts- Bsnx01a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-aluminum pan, bring the chicken broth and wine to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to a simmer and add tarragon.
3. Add the chicken breast cutlets and poach for 20-25 minutes until cooked through but still moist and tender.
4. Remove the chicken and keep warm.
5. Stir the dissolved corn starch into the poaching liquid, bring to a boil, and stir constantly.
6. Continue cooking over medium heat until the sauce thickens.
7. Season to taste and pour over the chicken breasts. Serve.
From package of Empire Individually Quick Frozen Chicken Breast Cutlets.
